name: The Hidden Hecahands
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>神の見えざる手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヘカトンケイル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl_base: The Unseen Hands of the Gods
desc: When you activate this card, you can also send 1 other card you control to the GY; add 1 "Hecahands" monster from your Deck to your hand, then if you sent another card to the GY at activation, you can Set 1 "Hecahands" Spell/Trap from your Deck, except "The Hidden Hecahands". You can banish this card from your GY; your opponent draws 1 card, then they discard 1 card. You can only use each effect of "The Hidden Hecahands" once per turn.
eff: When you activate this card, you can also send 1 other card you control to the GY; add 1 "Hecahands" monster from your Deck to your hand, then if you sent another card to the GY at activation, you can Set 1 "Hecahands" Spell/Trap from your Deck, except "The Hidden Hecahands". You can banish this card from your GY; your opponent draws 1 card, then they discard 1 card. You can only use each effect of "The Hidden Hecahands" once per turn.

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
